DEGgo 0.1.0
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Flexible ggplot2 theme used across DEGgo visualizations

Source: R/visualization.R
plot_theme.Rd

Flexible ggplot2 theme used across DEGgo visualizations

plot_theme(
  style = c("classic", "minimal", "bw", "test", "void", "dirty", "gray"),
  txtsize = 12,
  xy.val = TRUE,
  x.ang = 0,
  hjust = NULL,
  vjust = NULL,
  xlab = TRUE,
  ylab = TRUE,
  xy.lab = TRUE,
  facet.face = "bold",
  ttl.face = "bold",
  txt.face = c("plain", "italic", "bold"),
  ttl.pos = c("center", "left", "right"),
  x.ttl = TRUE,
  y.ttl = TRUE,
  ticks = NULL,
  line = NULL,
  border = NULL,
  grid.major = NULL,
  grid.minor = NULL,
  panel.fill = "white",
  facet.bg = TRUE,
  mode = c("light", "dark"),
  leg.pos = "right",
  leg.dir = "vertical",
  leg.size = 10,
  leg.ttl = 10,
  leg.ttl.size = 10,
  leg.just = "center",
  leg.ttl.text = NULL,
  ...
)

Arguments

style

Theme style.

txtsize

Base text size.

xy.val

Show axis tick labels.

x.ang

X-axis text angle.

hjust, vjust

Horizontal and vertical justification.

xlab, ylab

Show x/y axis tick labels.

xy.lab

Show all axis tick labels.

facet.face

Facet label font face.

ttl.face

Plot title font face.

txt.face

Text font face.

ttl.pos

Plot title position.

x.ttl, y.ttl

Show x/y axis titles.

ticks, line, border

Logical overrides.

grid.major, grid.minor

Logical overrides for grid lines.

panel.fill

Panel background fill.

facet.bg

Show facet background.

mode

Theme mode.

leg.pos

Legend position.

leg.dir

Legend direction.

leg.size

Legend text size.

leg.ttl

Legend title size.

leg.ttl.size

Legend title text size.

leg.just

Legend justification.

leg.ttl.text

Optional legend title text.

...

Additional arguments passed to ggplot2::theme().

Value

A ggplot2 theme object.

Contents

Developed by First Last.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
